programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Deadly Influence: The Social Media Murders
programme.desc: (M) 'Sex and Fitness guru' Ash builds a life in the glitz, glamor, and excess of Las Vegas. The wild ride ends when he becomes entangled with a lonely Sin City resident.
